songs.title: Down
feed: “Down” by blink-182 spends a 7th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Down” by blink-182 spends its 20th week in Personal Hot 100 this week.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 7,183 sales units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 41,071,800 streams units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 203,889 total units.
